queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of checking account balances below zero on the reduction of credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of credit default associated with critical credit history and other existing credits.
